affectedComponent: operator watchdog harness, not ospex protocol repositories
bug: Bash filename construction used `${profile-before-claim}` as if it were string concatenation; Bash treated it as parameter expansion on `profile` and omitted the literal `-before-claim` suffix when `profile` was set.
symptom: Postgame error alerts reported a missing per-profile before-claim status artifact even though the corresponding status artifact had been written.
fixApplied: The filename construction was changed to concatenate `${profile}` with the literal `-before-claim` suffix.
impact: Some failed alert ticks occurred after official-final score/settle work had begun but before claim planning completed. After patching the harness, claims completed; one immediate post-claim read observed projection/indexer lag, and the next verification read reached zero active/pending/claimable positions.
